creator: hrs@hrslab.yi.org
text:
ndtpd/ndtpcontrol/ndtpcheck command written in
	/usr/local/etc/rc.d/ndtpd.sh.sample are relying on relative
	path and $PATH.  They should be invoked in the form of
	absolute path derived from $PREFIX, I think.
	It is particularly useful when this script is used for
	controling ndtpd, not in boot time.

Fix: cvs diff: Diffing .
cvs diff: Diffing files
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/japanese/ndtpd; make install
